summary: Senior observability and data engineering professional with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience across telemetry analytics, APM platforms, operational reporting, SQL/Python automation, and production support. Strong background using Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics, CA APM, BMC TrueSight, and AppDynamics to turn monitoring and performance data into executive-ready insights, dashboards, thresholds, runbooks, and reliability-focused reporting. Experienced partnering with operations, infrastructure, application, and leadership teams to improve data quality, incident visibility, MTTR-oriented analysis, and decision-making for mission-critical environments.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints into reporting datasets used for capacity planning, executive visibility, and operational risk analysis.

Integrated BMC TrueSight, CA Wily/CA APM, and AppDynamics data into unified Oracle reporting layers, improving the ability to analyze health, utilization, incident patterns, and infrastructure risk across enterprise systems.
Built dashboards and reporting outputs with Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly to surface capacity trends, bottlenecks, utilization signals, and operational insights for senior stakeholders.
Developed data quality checks, validation logic, and reconciliation workflows to improve confidence in telemetry-driven reports used for provisioning, planning, and reliability decisions.
Improved runbook-style operational reporting, monitoring interpretation, and stakeholder communication by documenting metrics, source feeds, transformation logic, and recurring analysis processes.
Partnered with application, infrastructure, and operations teams to investigate performance issues, forecast bottlenecks, and support production incident prevention through data-driven analysis.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, supporting performance visibility across web, mobile, and revenue-impacting applications.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance data to produce actionable optimization recommendations adopted by engineering teams.
Implemented End User Monitoring and transaction tracing to improve visibility into user journeys, response-time patterns, and application dependencies.
Upgraded Dynatrace AppMon from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security with no production monitoring regression during cutover.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load testing behavior with APM telemetry and support release-readiness decisions.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial-services client, supporting enterprise monitoring across 50+ Enterprise Managers and thousands of instrumented agents.
Designed custom Management Modules, dashboards, alerts, and SLA thresholds that became reusable standards across client monitoring environments.
Built Perl and Korn shell automation for recurring performance reporting, reducing manual exports and improving consistency of operational telemetry reports.
Led CA APM upgrades and monitoring standardization efforts with strong focus on stability, documentation, onboarding, and cross-team coordination.
Collaborated with J2EE/WebLogic performance teams to analyze bottlenecks, interpret APM evidence, and support root-cause analysis for production issues.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify throughput limits and resource bottlenecks across JDBC connections, thread pools, heap, CPU, and garbage collection behavior.
Configured JMX monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation scripts to improve real-time observability during load and regression test cycles.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams for release gate decisions.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from distributed MySQL nodes to Oracle RAC, including validation, performance analysis, and production-readiness support.
Optimized C++/OCCI transaction processing and database access patterns, improving system efficiency while maintaining low-latency query behavior.
Built testing and validation frameworks to confirm migration correctness across large transaction datasets.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: Enterprise Telemetry Analytics & Capacity Reporting Platform
projects.description: Built Python-driven telemetry ingestion and reporting pipelines that transformed enterprise monitoring data into executive-level capacity, health, and operational insight reports. The work emphasized data quality, recurring reporting, threshold interpretation, and actionable visibility for infrastructure and application teams.

projects.name: FAST Performance Analytics Project
projects.description: Mined Dynatrace and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring data to identify performance patterns, user-impacting issues, and optimization opportunities for critical hospitality systems.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an agentic automation pipeline that uses structured JSON artifacts, semantic duplicate detection, quality gates, and application tracking. Relevant to this role as evidence of workflow automation, reporting discipline, and AI-assisted operational tooling.
